children.heading: Accident and health coverage
children.label: 1 Accident and health coverage
children.text: The term “accident and health coverage” means any coverage which, if provided by an insurance policy, would cause such policy to be a specified health insurance policy (as defined in section 4375(c)).

children.heading: Insurance policy
children.label: 2 Insurance policy
children.text: The term “insurance policy” means any policy or other instrument whereby a contract of insurance is issued, renewed, or extended.

children.heading: United States
children.label: 3 United States
children.text: The term “United States” includes any possession of the United States.

children.label: A
children.text: the term “person” includes any governmental entity, and

children.label: B
children.text: notwithstanding any other law or rule of law, governmental entities shall not be exempt from the fees imposed by this subchapter except as provided in paragraph (2).

children.heading: Treatment of exempt governmental programs
children.label: 2 Treatment of exempt governmental programs
children.text: In the case of an exempt governmental program, no fee shall be imposed under section 4375 or section 4376 on any covered life under such program.

children.label: A
children.text: any insurance program established under title XVIII of the Social Security Act,

children.label: B
children.text: the medical assistance program established by title XIX or XXI of the Social Security Act,

children.label: C
children.text: any program established by Federal law for providing medical care (other than through insurance policies) to individuals (or the spouses and dependents thereof) by reason of such individuals being members of the Armed Forces of the United States or veterans, and

children.label: D
children.text: any program established by Federal law for providing medical care (other than through insurance policies) to members of Indian tribes (as defined in section 4(d) of the Indian Health Care Improvement Act).

children.heading: Treatment as tax
children.label: c Treatment as tax
children.text: For purposes of subtitle F, the fees imposed by this subchapter shall be treated as if they were taxes.

children.heading: No cover over to possessions
children.label: d No cover over to possessions
children.text: Notwithstanding any other provision of law, no amount collected under this subchapter shall be covered over to any possession of the United States.
